note: Aliases: image, img. 'src' (alias 'path') required. Source resolved by ImageSource — file path, URL, data-URI, raw bytes.

x.description: anchor column index (0-based, e.g. x=2 means column C).

y.description: anchor row index (0-based, e.g. y=4 means row 5).

crop.description: Crop in percent (0-100). 1 value = symmetric, 2 values = vertical,horizontal, 4 values = left,top,right,bottom.

cropLeft.description: Crop from left as fraction (<=1) or percent (>1). E.g. cropLeft=0.1 or cropLeft=10 both mean 10%.

cropRight.description: Crop from right edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: cropright.

cropTop.description: Crop from top edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: croptop.

cropBottom.description: Crop from bottom edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: cropbottom.

mediaType.description: logical media kind derived from VideoFromFile / AudioFromFile presence under the picture. One of `picture`, `video`, `audio`. Surfaces only via the `image`/`video`/`audio`/`media` selectors.

id.description: OOXML shape id; source of the @id in the stable path /picture[@id=ID].

name.description: Override the auto-generated 'Picture {id}' label on cNvPr @name.
